title: Pixel Buddies
description: The official modpack for the Pixel Buddies server!
body:
This is the official modpack for the Pixel Buddies server! If you don't plan on playing there, this isn't very interesting for you.

It contains 2 mods:
- Quilted Fabric API (The general API of Quilt)
- AutoModpack (A mod that automatically downloads missing mods upon joining a server who also has it installed)
